assertionResults.title: Profile Name persists across Lock / Unlock / Reload
assertionResults.reason: Covered by passing mutator + sidebar tests for name save and lock/unlock persistence.

steps.action: Run updateProfileName and SettingsSidebar name-edit suites
steps.expected: Valid trimmed name saves and persists
steps.observed: Both suites passed including VAL-SETTINGS-001 cases

assertionResults.title: Empty / Whitespace Profile Name rejected
assertionResults.reason: Passing UI + mutator tests assert disabled/inline-error behavior and unchanged persistence.

steps.expected: Empty/whitespace blocked with unchanged persisted state

assertionResults.title: Created / Updated timestamps are real ISO-sourced values
assertionResults.reason: Passing tests verify Created/Updated sourced from active profile and updatedAt mutation behavior.

steps.action: Run Group Profile metadata and updatedAt persistence suites

assertionResults.title: Threshold / npub / Keyset Name come from the active profile
assertionResults.reason: Group Profile metadata suite passed and explicitly checks activeProfile sourcing + read-only rendering.

steps.action: Run SettingsSidebar group profile metadata tests
steps.expected: Keyset Name/Threshold/npub from active profile; read-only

assertionResults.title: wipe_state() invoked BEFORE runtime ref is dropped
assertionResults.reason: Dedicated wipe-order test passed and asserts phase ordering via debug call log + runtime spy.

assertionResults.title: Profile entry removed from IndexedDB
assertionResults.reason: clearCredentials suite passed and verifies profile record/index removal after clear.

steps.expected: Cleared profile record removed from persistent store

assertionResults.title: Navigates back to Welcome
assertionResults.reason: Supplementary dashboard clear-credentials flow test passed and showed landing no-profiles Welcome state.

steps.action: Run supplementary dashboard clear-credentials flow test
steps.expected: Clear credentials navigates to landing welcome state with cleared profile/runtime
steps.observed: Landing probe showed 0 profiles, no active profile, no runtime

assertionResults.title: Change Password persists; next unlock requires new password
assertionResults.reason: Lock/unlock with old/new password is covered, but explicit full page reload verification from this assertion is not directly evidenced by executed suites.

steps.expected: Old password rejected, new password accepted, and persists across reload
steps.observed: Old/new lock-unlock behavior passed; reload-specific proof not directly present

assertionResults.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for the reload leg of VAL-SETTINGS-018.

assertionResults.title: Wrong current password shows inline error
assertionResults.reason: Passing UI + mutator tests assert canonical inline error and unchanged credential record behavior.

assertionResults.title: Unicode / emoji / RTL / XSS safe in Profile Name
assertionResults.reason: Passing tests validate verbatim unicode handling and no script/img injection behavior.

steps.expected: Literal rendering with no injected script execution

assertionResults.title: Profile Name enforces max length
assertionResults.reason: Passing tests verify maxLength attribute, oversize validation, and mutator-level rejection.

steps.expected: Oversized names blocked/truncated and not persisted

assertionResults.title: Change Password rejects new === current
assertionResults.reason: Passing tests assert inline validation + storage unchanged when new password matches current.

assertionResults.title: Change Password rejects confirm-mismatch
assertionResults.reason: Change-password sidebar suite passed mismatch checks with disabled submit/no dispatch.

steps.expected: Mismatch shows error and blocks submit

assertionResults.title: Change Password rejects sub-minimum length
assertionResults.reason: Passing UI + mutator tests assert sub-minimum validation and no persistence mutation.

assertionResults.title: Unsaved changes prompt or auto-persist on navigation
assertionResults.reason: Dedicated unsaved-changes suite passed across close/lock/clear/replace-share navigation paths.

steps.expected: Dirty edits guarded by confirm dialog; no silent loss

assertionResults.title: Persistence across Lock → Unlock (M3 + M5 + Welcome/Unlock)
assertionResults.reason: Partial evidence exists (profile-name lock/unlock), but this full cross assertion's relay-order + specific policy state + connecting-transition + console-clean requirements are not directly covered in executed suites.

steps.action: Run profile-name persistence and policy persistence suites

assertionResults.issues: Insufficient direct evidence for full VAL-CROSS-004 end-to-end contract.

assertionResults.title: Clear Credentials wipes all state (Lock/Clear + M5 + wipe_state)
assertionResults.reason: Wipe-order/indexeddb/navigation pieces are covered, but full assertion evidence (explicit sensitive-key sessionStorage regex scan and clean-console run) is not fully satisfied by the executed suites.

steps.action: Run clearCredentials wipe-order + dashboard clear flow suites
steps.expected: Full wipe-state cross assertion with clean telemetry
steps.observed: Core wipe/navigation checks passed; full evidence set remains incomplete

assertionResults.issues: Supplementary run includes known pre-existing dashboard console warning; strict no-console + explicit sessionStorage regex-scan evidence not fully direct.

summary: Validated 17 assigned assertions via targeted and supplementary vitest runs: 14 pass, 0 fail, 3 blocked (VAL-SETTINGS-018, VAL-CROSS-004, VAL-CROSS-006) due insufficient direct evidence for full contract criteria.

blockers.description: Direct test evidence does not fully cover VAL-SETTINGS-018's explicit full-page-reload leg after password rotation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Executed both UI and mutator change-password suites; lock/unlock leg covered but no explicit reload assertion in executed suites.

blockers.description: No executed single flow directly proves the complete VAL-CROSS-004 composite contract (relay order + specific policy state + reconnect transition + console-clean).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Added supplementary policy-persistence suite to improve coverage; still partial vs full cross contract.

blockers.description: VAL-CROSS-006 strict evidence set remains incomplete (explicit sensitive sessionStorage key-pattern scan and clean-console requirement).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Added supplementary dashboard clear-credentials flow test plus wipe-order suite; core wipe checks pass, but strict evidence criteria remain partial.

frictions.description: Supplementary Dashboard clear-credentials test emitted the known pre-existing nested-button hydration warning from PeersPanel.
frictions.resolution: Continued run per AGENTS known-issues guidance; warning did not block test execution.
